headline: The Bull Case For Dominion Energy (D) Could Change Following Extended Sustainability-Linked Credit Facilities - Learn Why
summary: In early April 2026, Dominion Energy amended its sustainability-linked revolving credit facility and extended its core revolving credit agreement, pushing key maturities out to 2029 and 2031 to reinforce long-term liquidity for projects like its large offshore wind development. This enhanced access to flexible, sustainability-linked funding offers greater balance sheet resilience as Dominion Energy prepares to report earnings and continues building out regulated renewables. We will now...

headline: Dominion Energy’s Offshore Wind Milestone And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Dominion Energy's Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project has delivered its first power to the grid. The project is the largest offshore wind development in the United States to begin operations. Once fully operational, it is expected to supply clean energy to more than 500,000 customers. For investors watching NYSE:D, this milestone arrives with the stock at $64.23 and a 1 year return of 27.4%. Over 3 years, the stock shows a 28.6% return, while the year to date move sits at 8.4%. This...
